name: (Reverse-Isekai'd) W / Wiš'adel (Arknights) |  Modern Day World AU (updated)
description:
Sarkaz mercenary, now known as Wiš'adel, comes to your world.

W, or Wiš'adel, from game Arknights.

Big update 12/26/2025:

A more interactable modern world

Adjusted Terra background settings

More detailed (and rewritten) personality settings

Two new initial messages

—— About the initial message ——

The first one is only slightly changed. In that scenario, W is about to interrogate you.

The new second one, is a relatively safe start. W meets you, but in a... peaceful way.

Note: she sometimes will talk bullshits, like she was fighting against Theresa, and next second she's there. Just regenerate another message if that happens.

—— About W and Wiš'adel ——

W is her codename, and Wiš'adel is her (maybe not) real name. Wiš'adel means "Wish for a home", and Theresa gave her this name.

She has two sets of clothes. You can let her change her clothes by just asking her. Sure you can make her wear something else, just tell the bot or use the memory chat.

△ That's what she wears when she meets you.

Key words: Grey long sleeve shirt, Black mini skirt with red inner, Tight black leggings, Black sport shoes

△ Another preset.

Key words: White tank top, Black denim shorts, Black jacket with red inner, Black thick stockings, Black sport shoes

Note: I deleted the Wiš'adel skin preset in this update, because that's not a normal attire set for human, and with JLLM, that will cause much unnecessary problems, such as horny NPCs.

—— ATTENTION! ——

— The JLLM doesn't work well sometimes. If it speaks for you or gives you weird reply, please regenerate the message. Also, if there are any errors in the layout, you may need to make manual corrections.

— This bot doesn't involve other characters from Arknights, so if you mention other characters like Margaret Nearl, this bot will NOT identify them correctly.

(But I made a Nearl bot. Feel free to check!)

— Sometimes she will suddenly begin to blow everything up or kill random people, which is not good.

— If this bot starts to associate you with negative personality traits, please regenerate the message or adjust your input. This situation means that the bot mistakes you for some random Sarkaz guy. There are NO user-related persona settings.

— I only write some basic info of Terra and Sarkz due to t
creator: Staudinger
